message:
feat(robot): add degraded health state and improve agent detection

Multiple improvements to agent health monitoring and resilience:

Diagnose command (internal/robot/diagnose.go):
- Add explicit "degraded" health state for agents that are neither
  healthy nor fully failed (e.g., stalled but not crashed)
- Add investigation recommendations for stalled panes with fix commands
- Update overall health determination to include degraded state

Agent Mail client (internal/agentmail/client.go):
- Add safety check for empty slug in HasArchiveForProject to prevent
  path traversal to parent archive directory

Resilience monitor (internal/resilience/monitor.go):
- Prefer NTM index (logical agent number) over tmux pane index when
  available for consistent agent identification across sessions

TUI dashboard ticker (internal/tui/dashboard/panels/ticker.go):
- Minor formatting adjustments for consistency

Tests:
- Add comprehensive test suite for ProjectSlugFromPath covering edge
  cases: paths with spaces, uppercase, special characters, and roots

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+package agentmail
+
+import "testing"
+
+func TestProjectSlugFromPath(t *testing.T) {
+	tests := []struct {
+		input    string
+		expected string
+	}{
+		{"/Users/jemanuel/projects/ntm", "ntm"},
+		{"/home/user/code/my-project", "my-project"},
+		{"/var/www/html/site_v1", "site_v1"},
+		{"/tmp/test project", "test_project"},
+		{"/path/to/UPPERCASE", "uppercase"},
+		{"/path/to/mixed-CASE_project", "mixed-case_project"},
+		{"/root", "root"},
+		{".", "root"},
+		{"/", "root"},
+		{"", ""},
+		{"/path/with/!@#$%^&*()", ""}, // All invalid chars
+		{"/path/to/valid-123_ok", "valid-123_ok"},
+		{"relative/path", "path"},
+	}
+
+	for _, tt := range tests {
+		t.Run(tt.input, func(t *testing.T) {
+			got := ProjectSlugFromPath(tt.input)
+			if got != tt.expected {
+				t.Errorf("ProjectSlugFromPath(%q) = %q; want %q", tt.input, got, tt.expected)
+			}
+		})
+	}
+}

@@ -350,43 +350,43 @@ func (m *TickerPanel) styleVisibleText(text string) string {

+	result = strings.Replace(result, "Mail:", mailLabel, -1)
 
 	// Style "Ckpt:" label

 	// Style "OK" in green

-	result = strings.Replace(result, " OK", " "+okStyled, 1)
+	result = strings.Replace(result, " OK", " "+okStyled, -1)
 
 	// Style "offline" in dim
 	offlineStyled := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(t.Overlay).Italic(true).Render("offline")
-	result = strings.Replace(result, "offline", offlineStyled, 1)
+	result = strings.Replace(result, "offline", offlineStyled, -1)
 
 	// Style "detected" in yellow (MCP-only mode, partial functionality)
 	detectedStyled := lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(t.Yellow).Render("detected")
-	result = strings.Replace(result, "detected", detectedStyled, 1)
+	result = strings.Replace(result, "detected", detectedStyled, -1)
 
 	return result
 }
